name: FR Rigault de Genouilly
events: 1 Feb 1940 HMS Otus (Lt.Cdr. E.C.F. Nicolay, RN) departed Diego Suarez for her 6th war patrol. She was ordered to patrol in the Indian Ocean together with the French sloop Rigault de Genouilly (Capitaine De Fregate (Cdr.) L.G.E. Frossard).
For the daily positions of HMS Otus during this patrol see the map below.

7 Feb 1940 HMS Otus (Lt.Cdr. E.C.F. Nicolay, RN) departed Mahé, Seychelles to resume her 6th war patrol still with French sloop Rigault de Genouilly (Capitaine De Fregate (Cdr.) L.G.E. Frossard) in company. (1)

17 Mar 1940 HMS Odin (Lt.Cdr. K.M. Woods, RN) made rendez-vous with the French sloop Rigault de Genouilly (Capitaine De Fregate (Cdr.) L.G.E. Frossard). They then proceeded to patrol together until the 19th. (2)

26 Mar 1940 HMS Orpheus (Cdr. C.J. Blake, RN) departed Diego Suarez for her 5th war patrol. She was ordered to patrol off Réunion together with the French sloop Rigault de Genouilly (CF (= Cdr) L.G.E. Frossard).
For the daily positions of HMS Orpheus during this patrol see the map below.
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
